expectations.text: A PRD file exists in outputs
expectations.evidence: File PRD-notification-system.md exists in the outputs directory.

expectations.text: PRD describes Firestore collection or schema for notifications
expectations.evidence: Lines 56-71: Section '4.2 In-App Notifications (Phase 1)' includes a 'Data Model - Firestore notifications collection' with a full TypeScript Notification interface (recipientUid, type, processId, processTitle, previousStatus, newStatus, triggeredBy, triggeredByName, read, createdAt). Lines 126-141 also provide Firestore security rules for the notifications collection.

expectations.text: Email notifications are scoped to Phase 2 or later, not Phase 1
expectations.evidence: Lines 92-109: Section '4.3 Email Notifications (Phase 2 - Future)' explicitly labels email as Phase 2. The roadmap file also places email in 'Phase 2: Email Notifications (Future)' at line 113.

The PRD contains user stories in a table (section 4) and non-functional requirements (section 4.4), but there is no dedicated acceptance criteria section with testable checkbox items. The testing section in the roadmap file (lines 93-103) has checkbox items, but that is in the roadmap, not the PRD itself.

expectations.text: A ROADMAP.md file exists in outputs
expectations.evidence: The file is named 'ROADMAP-notification-system.md', not 'ROADMAP.md'. While it serves as a roadmap, it does not match the expected ROADMAP.md filename.

expectations.text: Discovery or clarifying questions were asked before writing the PRD
expectations.evidence: The PRD contains an 'Open Questions' section (section 8) at the end with 4 questions, but these are post-hoc questions appended to the document, not evidence that discovery questions were asked to the user before writing the PRD. No transcript or conversation log exists showing a pre-PRD discovery phase.
